data.title: Travelzoo offers club members in Canada new Club Offers on travel deals, including a $999 4-night getaway to Dublin.
data.description: Travelzoo® (NASDAQ: TZOO) has unveiled multiple exclusive Club Offers for their members in Canada, including a 4-night getaway to Dublin for $999. The package includes flights and allows travelers to explore the vibrant culture of Ireland. The company has rigorously vetted and negotiated these deals to provide unparalleled experiences for travel enthusiasts.

data.title: InventHelp inventor from Mississauga, ON develops Grip Lock Safety Bar (TRO-1559) to prevent loaded pallets from falling.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 20, 2026, an inventor from Mississauga, ON, Canada, shared insights about their innovative solution for preventing loaded pallets from falling in the warehouse equipment industry. The inventor introduced the GRIP LOCK SAFETY BAR as a secure method to address this issue. The new design is aimed at enhancing safety measures within warehouses by providing a reliable way to secure loaded pallets.

data.title: Coinbase rolls out prediction markets in all 50 states, aiming to become the 'everything exchange' by offering markets on cryptocurrency, politics, sports, and more. COIN stock is gaining momentum. Strategy includes adding support for equities, commodities, and prediction markets by end of 2025. Coinbase Leader predicts significant growth in sector.
data.description: Coinbase Global has expanded its prediction markets to all 50 U.S. states in partnership with Kalshi, offering markets on cryptocurrency prices, politics, sports, and more. This move is part of the company's strategy to broaden its customer base and provide more tools. The head of Coinbase's prediction markets, Toni Gemayel, emphasized the goal of becoming an "everything exchange." The company's stock, COIN, is experiencing positive momentum. Coinbase plans to introduce support for equities, commodities, and prediction markets by the end of 2025. Gemayel highlighted the symbiotic relationship between prediction markets and the crypto industry. (Word count: 112)

data.title: Select VFX Studio in Chennai, India, gains trust in the industry through consistent performance since 2022.
data.description: Located in Chennai, India, Select VFX Studio, established in June 2022, stands out in an industry known for scale and speed by prioritizing trust and consistent performance. Since its inception, the studio has experienced steady growth and positive reception for its work.

data.title: Realtor.com® announces SXSW 2026 lineup, featuring cookbook author and country music entertainer Hannah Dasher, music duo Dorio, at their East Austin Headquarters.
data.description: The central gathering for real estate, housing, and technology known as the Two-Day "Open House" is set to take place at Realtor.com®'s East Austin Headquarters in Austin, Texas. This event, occurring during SXSW 2026, will showcase the talents of cookbook author and country music entertainer Hannah Dasher, as well as the music duo Dorio, among others. This event promises to be a vibrant convergence of industry professionals, with notable guests coming together to celebrate and engage.
